name: Daily SEO digest + silent-failure alert (Google Search Console)

parameters.content:
## Daily SEO digest + silent-failure alert (Google Search Console)

### How it works

This workflow runs every morning to pull Google Search Console performance data, aggregate it, and append the daily metrics to a Google Sheet. It then reads recent sheet rows, compares the latest metrics with yesterday’s values, and posts a digest to Discord. After a successful digest it sends a heartbeat ping, while a separate error path sends a failure ping if the workflow breaks silently.

### Setup steps

- Configure the daily schedule trigger for the desired local timezone and run time.
- Set up Google Search Console API access in the HTTP Request node, including OAuth credentials and the correct verified site/property URL.
- Configure the Google Sheets nodes with the target spreadsheet, sheet/tab, and matching columns for the aggregated SEO metrics.
- Add the Discord credential or webhook/channel settings for the digest message.
- Replace the Checkilo heartbeat and failure ping URLs with the correct monitor endpoints.

### Customization

Adjust the aggregation code, comparison thresholds, Discord message format, and the date range used for Google Search Console data to match the SEO metrics you want to track.

## Schedule and fetch data

Starts the workflow each morning and requests the latest Google Search Console data from the API.

## Aggregate and store metrics

Transforms the raw Search Console response into daily summary metrics and appends them to the tracking Google Sheet.

## Read and compare history

Reads stored sheet rows and calculates the change between the latest daily metrics and yesterday’s values.

## Send digest heartbeat

Posts the SEO digest to Discord, then sends a success heartbeat ping to confirm the daily workflow completed.

## Error failure alert

Separate lower-canvas error branch that triggers on workflow failures and sends a failure ping to the monitoring endpoint.
